name: Macaroni & Cheese Souffle
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Natural sharp Cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (moderate).
2. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Cook macaroni according to package directions.
4. Melt butter in a large saucepan over moderate heat.
5. Stir in flour, salt, paprika, and cayenne. Gradually add milk, stirring until thickened.
6. Remove from heat; stir in cheese until melted.
7. Beat egg yolks until light.
8. Gently fold the yolk mixture into the macaroni and cheese.
9. Pour into prepared casserole dish.
10. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until firm to the touch when pressed lightly.
11. Serve immediately.
Calories per 1 cup serving: About 300
Source: FOOD -- by U.S. Department of Agriculture
